description:
Claude Managed Agents just shipped two security improvements — self-hosted sandboxes (public beta) and MCP tunnels (research preview). Anthropic kept the agent loop; tool execution and private MCP servers now run inside your firewall. The agentic AI feature your enterprise security team has been waiting for.

----
🚀 DYNAMOUS AI COMMUNITY

Want to learn agentic coding with live daily events and workshops?
Check out Dynamous AI: https://dynamous.ai/?code=646a60
Get 10% off here 👉 https://shorturl.smartcode.diy/dynamous_ai_10_percent_discount

⚡ HOSTINGER — RELIABLE HOSTING FOR YOUR PROJECTS (10% OFF)

Whether you're shipping a portfolio, a side project, n8n flows, or AI agents — I use Hostinger for fast, affordable VPS + web hosting.

Get 10% off here 👉 https://hostinger.com/DIYSMARTCODE

(Affiliate link — costs you nothing, supports the channel.)
----

What's in this 3-minute Short:
- The perimeter swap — loop stays Anthropic-side, execution + files stay yours
- Sandboxes: public beta. MCP tunnels: research preview (request access)
- The tunnel pattern: single outbound connection, zero inbound firewall rules
- 4 providers — Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, Vercel — plus a working Docker reference
- Amplitude shipped their Design Agent in two days on Managed Agents + Cloudflare

Anthropic announcement: https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents-updates
Self-hosted sandboxes docs: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/managed-agents/self-hosted-sandboxes
MCP tunnels overview: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agents-and-tools/mcp-tunnels/overview
MCP tunnels request access: https://claude.com/form/claude-managed-agents
Anthropic cookbook (6 reference impls): https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks/tree/main/managed_agents/self_hosted_sandboxes
Cloudflare guide: https://developers.cloudflare.com/sandbox/claude-managed-agents/
Daytona guide: https://www.daytona.io/docs/en/guides/claude/claude-managed-agents
Modal repo: https://github.com/modal-labs/claude-managed-agents-modal-sandbox
Vercel guide: https://vercel.com/kb/guide/run-claude-managed-agent-tools-with-vercel-sandbox

Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, or Vercel — which sandbox would YOUR security team approve first? Drop your pick below.
